registry.rs exposes list_acoustic_models() which returns descriptors for source-filter and various neural models. acoustic_model_by_id(id) matches string IDs to construct a boxed backend, mapping ids 'source-filter', 'fastspeech2', 'matcha', 'vits-piper', 'speecht5'. Tests confirm these ids and that the neural backend is not source-filter.
